actions.text: Demo 7: Workflow Skills — build once, reuse forever
Use the workflow-skill-creator to distill a reusable FastAPI scaffolding skill from our conversation
actions.subtitle: Distill any workflow into a reusable SKILL.md
agy brainstorms, designs, builds, and validates the skill

actions.text: Future: just say 'Use fastapi-app-scaffold to build a blog API'
